Bash(python -c "
from mock_data import get_mock_workload_anomalies, get_mock_network_anomalies, get_mock_storage_anomalies, get_mock_node_pressures, get_mock_control_plane_statuses
import json

print\('=== Workload Anomalies ==='\)
for w in get_mock_workload_anomalies\(\):
    print\(f'  {w.name} \({w.kind}\): {w.status}, fatal_reason={w.fatal_reason}'\)

print\('\\\\n=== Network Anomalies ==='\)
for n in get_mock_network_anomalies\(\):
    print\(f'  {n.name} \({n.kind}\): {n.status}, reason={n.reason}'\)

print\('\\\\n=== Storage Anomalies ==='\)
for s in get_mock_storage_anomalies\(\):
    print\(f'  {s.name} \({s.kind}\): {s.status}, reason={s.reason}'\)

print\('\\\\n=== Node Pressures ==='\)
for np in get_mock_node_pressures\(\):
    print\(f'  {np.name}: {np.status}, pressure_type={np.pressure_type}'\)

print\('\\\\n=== Control Plane Statuses ==='\)
for cp in get_mock_control_plane_statuses\(\):
    print\(f'  {cp.component} \({cp.pod_name}\): {cp.status}, restarts={cp.restarts}'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
from fastapi.testclient import TestClient
from main import app

client = TestClient\(app\)
response = client.get\('/api/inspection/anomalies'\)
print\('Status:', response.status_code\)
if response.status_code == 200:
    import json
    data = response.json\(\)
    print\('Workload Anomalies:', len\(data.get\('workload_anomalies', []\)\)\)
    print\('Network Anomalies:', len\(data.get\('network_anomalies', []\)\)\)
    print\('Storage Anomalies:', len\(data.get\('storage_anomalies', []\)\)\)
    print\('Node Pressures:', len\(data.get\('node_pressures', []\)\)\)
    print\('Control Plane Statuses:', len\(data.get\('control_plane_statuses', []\)\)\)
else:
    print\('Error:', response.text\)
")

Bash(python -c "
from schemas import InspectionAnomaliesResponse
from mock_data import \(
    get_mock_workload_anomalies, get_mock_network_anomalies,
    get_mock_storage_anomalies, get_mock_node_pressures,
    get_mock_control_plane_statuses
\)

workload_anomalies = get_mock_workload_anomalies\(\)
network_anomalies = get_mock_network_anomalies\(\)
storage_anomalies = get_mock_storage_anomalies\(\)
node_pressures = get_mock_node_pressures\(\)
control_plane_statuses = get_mock_control_plane_statuses\(\)

response = InspectionAnomaliesResponse\(
    workload_anomalies=workload_anomalies,
    network_anomalies=network_anomalies,
    storage_anomalies=storage_anomalies,
    node_pressures=node_pressures,
    control_plane_statuses=control_plane_statuses
\)

print\('InspectionAnomaliesResponse created successfully!'\)
print\('Workload Anomalies:', len\(response.workload_anomalies\)\)
print\('Network Anomalies:', len\(response.network_anomalies\)\)
print\('Storage Anomalies:', len\(response.storage_anomalies\)\)
print\('Node Pressures:', len\(response.node_pressures\)\)
print\('Control Plane Statuses:', len\(response.control_plane_statuses\)\)
")

Bash(cd D:/claude/test04/backend && python3 -c "
import ast
import sys

files = [
    'cluster_manager.py',
    'config.py', 
    'database.py',
    'k8s_service.py',
    'main.py',
    'mock_data.py',
    'routes.py',
    'schemas.py'
]

print\('=== Python 文件语法检查 ==='\)
all_ok = True
for f in files:
    try:
        with open\(f, encoding='utf-8'\) as file:
            ast.parse\(file.read\(\)\)
        print\(f'  ✓ {f}'\)
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'  ✗ {f}: {e}'\)
        all_ok = False

print\(\)
if all_ok:
    print\('✓ 所有 Python 文件语法正确'\)
else:
    print\('✗ 存在语法错误'\)
    sys.exit\(1\)
")

    'cluster_manager.py',

]

import ast

    ast.parse\(content\)
    print\('main.py 语法 OK'\)
except SyntaxError as e:
    print\('Syntax error:', e\)
except Exception as e:
    print\('Error:', e\)
")
